title: Meeting someone special
setting: At a party, you're talking with Lucía, someone you've just met and really like. The conversation is going well.

steps.speaker: Lucía
steps.es: Me cae bien hablar con vos. Sos diferente.
steps.en: I like talking with you. You're different.

options.es: A mí también me gusta hablar con vos.
options.en: I like talking with you too.
options.feedback: Warm and reciprocal — returning the feeling keeps the spark alive without overdoing it.
Lukewarm! She opened up a little — meet her warmth, don't deflect it.
Playful and a little flirty — works if your tone is light, risky if she meant it sincerely.

steps.speaker: Lucía
steps.es: Bueno bueno, jaja. Contame más de vos.
steps.en: Good good, haha. Tell me more about you.

options.es: Vine a aprender español, pero me quedé por la gente.
options.en: I came to learn Spanish, but I stayed for the people.
options.feedback: Lovely and a little charming — it hints she's part of why you'd stay. Smooth.
Closes the door she's opening. Give her something — curiosity is interest.

options.en: What do you want to know?
options.feedback: Fine, turns it back to her — but offering something yourself first feels warmer.

steps.speaker: Lucía
steps.es: Qué lindo. ¿Y te hallás aquí entonces?
steps.en: How sweet. So you feel at home here?

options.es: Cada día más, sobre todo esta noche.
options.feedback: Gently flirtatious without being too much — 'especially tonight' lands beautifully.

options.es: Sí, la gente es muy cálida.
options.en: Yes, the people are very warm.
options.feedback: Sincere and kind. A safe, genuine answer that compliments her world.
A bit flat for such a warm moment. Let a little more feeling through.

steps.speaker: Lucía
steps.en: I'd like to see you again.

options.es: Ojalá que sí. ¿Te doy mi número?
options.en: I hope so. Can I give you my number?
options.feedback: 'Ojalá' (subjunctive of hope) plus a clear next step — perfect, and confident.
'Me encantaría' (I'd love to) is warm and eager in just the right measure.
After such a sweet moment, 'maybe' is cold. If you're interested, show it!
